modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to re-image a computer for a new employee.

full_description_text:  
I'm requesting a setup for a new employee. The desktop needs to be wiped clean and re-imaged. Also, I have an old computer that should be cleaned up and updated.
short_description: Need to re-image a computer for a new employee.
description: I'm requesting a setup for a new employee. The desktop needs to be wiped clean and re-imaged. Also, I have an old computer that should be cleaned up and updated.
